title: The Match King
writer: Einar Thorvaldson, Houston Branch, Sidney Sutherland
actors: Warren William, Lili Damita, Glenda Farrell
plot: Unscrupulous Paul Kroll, starting as a Chicago janitor, uses graft to finance a trip to Sweden where by trickery he gains control of his uncle's small match factory. By expert manipulation of everyone and employment of femmes-fata...
